Admission Programs

UGIP offers diploma programs in Engineering (E-Group) and Pharmacy (P-Group) with a streamlined admission process aligned with state guidelines.

🔧

Engineering Programs (E-Group)

Comprehensive diploma programs combining theory and hands-on training across 5 branches:

  • Civil Engineering – Infrastructure, construction, structural analysis
  • Mechanical Engineering – Thermodynamics, machine design, manufacturing
  • Electrical Engineering – Circuits, power systems, electronics
  • Electronics Engineering – Microprocessors, communication systems
  • Information Technology – Programming, networking, software development
Duration: 3 Years Intake: 40/branch Fee: ₹8,400/year

Eligibility for Engineering

  • Passed 10th (High School) from a recognized board.
  • Must have studied Science & Mathematics.
  • Minimum 35% marks in the qualifying exam.
  • Entrance clearance via the UBTER JEEP exam.
💊

Pharmacy Program (P-Group)

Diploma in Pharmacy focusing on comprehensive pharmaceutical sciences and healthcare:

  • Pharmacology & Toxicology
  • Pharmaceutics & Drug Delivery Systems
  • Pharmaceutical Chemistry
  • Pharmacognosy
  • Hospital & Clinical Pharmacy Management
Duration: 2 Years Intake: 35 seats Fee: ₹8,400/year

Eligibility for Pharmacy

  • Passed 12th (Intermediate) from a recognized board.
  • Must have studied Physics, Chemistry & Biology/Mathematics.
  • Minimum 45% marks in the qualifying exam.
  • Entrance clearance via the UBTER JEEP exam.

Admission Process

Follow these sequential steps to apply for admission at UGIP Nainital.

1

Fill Application Form

Apply online at the UBTER portal. Application forms generally open in April every year for the JEEP entrance exam.

2

Appear in JEEP Exam

Appear in the UBTER JEEP (Joint Entrance Exam Polytechnic) held in May. Ensure you bring your admit card and ID proof.

3

Check Results

JEEP results are declared in June. Check the UBTER official website regularly for your rank and merit list updates.

4

Online Counseling

Participate in online counseling for seat allotment based on your rank, preference, and current seat availability.

5

Document Verification

Report to the allotted institute with your original documents for verification and to complete fee payment formalities.

6

Admission Confirmed

After successful document verification and fee payment, your admission is confirmed. Classes officially begin in August.
